title: Crunchy Algerian Rye Bread Sandwich
description: A rich, crunchy, cozy algerian dish featuring a rich blend of flavors in a rye bread sandwich with a side of pickles, all while being plant-based-friendly.
instructions: Slice the rye bread and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Toast the slices in the preheated oven for about 2 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the oven and let them cool slightly.

Assemble the sandwich by spreading avocado spread and plant-based mayonnaise on one slice of toasted rye bread, followed by pickled vegetables, fresh herbs (if using), lettuce leaves, cherry tomatoes, and finally the other slice of toasted rye bread.
For an added crunch, sprinkle some extra crunchy toppings such as seeds or nuts over the assembled sandwich before serving.
